title: Slopsmith plugin manifest
description: Schema for plugins/<id>/plugin.json. See docs/plugin-manifest.md for prose. License enum mirrors the curated-plugin allowlist in CONTRIBUTING.md (keep them in sync; tests/test_plugin_schema.py asserts subset).

id.description: Snake-case identifier. Used to namespace localStorage, the plugin screen id (plugin-<id>), the backend logger (slopsmith.plugin.<id>), and the diagnostics bundle directory. Reverse-DNS form (com.example.foo) is supported via the load_sibling encoding.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in UI surfaces.

version.description: Plain semver string. Advisory only; the plugin loader does not consume this.

private.description: Advisory metadata for plugin authors. Not consumed by the loader.

bundled.description: True for plugins shipped in-tree with Slopsmith. Used by tooling that distinguishes built-in plugins from user-installed ones.

type.description: Role hint (slopsmith#36). 'visualization' makes the plugin eligible for the viz picker; must pair with a window.slopsmithViz_<id> factory.

license.description: SPDX identifier. For curated plugins, must match CONTRIBUTING.md's allowlist.

nav.description: Adds a navbar entry that calls showScreen(<screen>). Typically screen is 'plugin-<id>'.

screen.description: Relative path to HTML mounted at #plugin-<id>.

script.description: Relative path to JS loaded in global scope on page load. Wrap your code in an IIFE.

routes.description: Relative path to Python module exporting setup(app, context). See docs/plugin-manifest.md.

tour.description: Relative path to tour JSON for the in-app onboarding tour.

items.description: Relpath under context['config_dir']. No abs paths, no '..', no backslashes. Trailing '/' denotes a directory (recurse).

server_files.description: Opt-in for Settings export/import (slopsmith#113). Files included in user-triggered backups. See docs/plugin-manifest.md.
Files copied verbatim into plugins/<id>/<relpath> inside the diagnostics bundle.

callable.description: <module>:<function> resolved via load_sibling at export time. Called with {'plugin_id', 'config_dir'} dict; return dict/list/bytes/str.

diagnostics.description: Opt-in for the Export Diagnostics bundle (slopsmith#166). See docs/plugin-diagnostics.md.

allOf.$comment: type=visualization requires a script (the window.slopsmithViz_<id> factory)
